commands.review_summary:
The PR updates browser tab selection to retain newly opened targets, poll for delayed per-tab WebSocket URLs on local-managed profiles, fall back to selectable tabs, and add regression tests.

PR surface: Source +45, Tests +124. Total +169 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main discards the opened tab, then filters local-managed candidates without wsUrl before throwing. I did not run a live Chrome timing reproduction in this read-only review.
